query:
UPDATE refresh_tokens
               SET revoked_at = now(), revoked_reason = $1
               WHERE id IN (
                   SELECT id FROM refresh_tokens
                   WHERE user_id = $2
                     AND revoked_at IS NULL
                     AND used_at IS NULL
                     AND expires_at > now()
                   ORDER BY last_used_at ASC
                   LIMIT GREATEST(0, (
                       SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refresh_tokens
                       WHERE user_id = $2
                         AND revoked_at IS NULL
                         AND used_at IS NULL
                         AND expires_at > now()
                   ) - ($3 - 1))
               )
